_meta.description: Enterprise daily telemetry extended with context, configured daily inputs, and derived fields used by the Time Efficiency dashboard.

field_categories.flattened_source: Flattened from nested enterprise telemetry objects.
field_categories.context: Injected from query/page context, not present in telemetry.
field_categories.configured: Provided from external config or testing inputs.
field_categories.derived: Calculated from source and/or configured fields.

day.purpose: Primary daily key for the enterprise trend series.
day.notes: One row per day in the selected 28-day enterprise window.

report_start_day.purpose: Start of the report window used to build the dataframe.
report_start_day.notes: Not present in enterprise day_totals payload.

report_end_day.purpose: End of the report window used to build the dataframe.
report_end_day.notes: Not present in enterprise day_totals payload.

enterprise_slug.purpose: Human-meaningful enterprise key used by the query layer.
enterprise_slug.notes: Optional if only enterprise_id is needed.

scope_type.purpose: Normalized scope label for downstream logic.
scope_type.notes: Allows the same dashboard logic to extend later to org/team/repo scopes.

scope_key.purpose: Normalized scope identifier used by shared logic.
scope_key.notes: Useful for a common cross-scope model.

daily_active_users.purpose: Raw daily count of active Copilot users.
daily_active_users.notes: Natural enterprise-level denominator for daily per-active-dev normalization.

daily_active_cli_users.purpose: Raw daily count of active CLI users.
daily_active_cli_users.notes: May be null or absent on some days.

weekly_active_users.purpose: Weekly active user count as reported on each day.
weekly_active_users.notes: Useful context but not the primary denominator for daily normalization.

monthly_active_users.purpose: Monthly active user count as reported on each day.
monthly_active_users.notes: Used more for adoption context than daily efficiency math.

monthly_active_chat_users.purpose: Monthly active chat users as reported on each day.
monthly_active_chat_users.notes: Useful later for structure and chat share context.

monthly_active_agent_users.purpose: Monthly active agent users as reported on each day.
monthly_active_agent_users.notes: Useful later for structure and agent share context.

user_initiated_interaction_count.notes: Included because it exists at both enterprise and user-day grain.

code_generation_activity_count.purpose: Raw daily code generation activity count.
code_generation_activity_count.notes: Included because it exists at both enterprise and user-day grain.

code_acceptance_activity_count.purpose: Raw daily code acceptance activity count.
code_acceptance_activity_count.notes: Included because it exists at both enterprise and user-day grain.

loc_suggested_to_add_sum.purpose: Raw daily suggested added lines of code.
loc_suggested_to_add_sum.notes: Included because it exists at both enterprise and user-day grain.

loc_suggested_to_delete_sum.purpose: Raw daily suggested deleted lines of code.
loc_suggested_to_delete_sum.notes: Often zero in the sample data but should still be preserved.

loc_added_sum.purpose: Raw daily added lines of code under Copilot-related flows.
loc_added_sum.notes: Also used for daily Copilot LoC share calculations.

loc_deleted_sum.purpose: Raw daily deleted lines of code under Copilot-related flows.
loc_deleted_sum.notes: Included because it exists at both enterprise and user-day grain.

pr_total_reviewed.notes: Optional for first page, but useful for later correlation.

cli_session_count.notes: Optional for the first row-2 trend set.

cli_request_count.notes: Optional for the first row-2 trend set.

copilot_active_devs_day.purpose: Standardized daily denominator for normalization and aggregate impact math.
copilot_active_devs_day.notes: Semantic alias of daily_active_users for dashboard formulas.

copilot_active_denominator_rule.purpose: Documents how active denominator was chosen.
copilot_active_denominator_rule.notes: Useful when later scopes compute active devs from user-day rows.

interactions_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily interaction intensity per active Copilot developer.

generations_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily code generation intensity per active Copilot developer.

acceptances_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily code acceptance intensity per active Copilot developer.

loc_suggested_add_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily suggested added LoC per active Copilot developer.

loc_suggested_delete_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily suggested deleted LoC per active Copilot developer.

loc_added_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily added LoC per active Copilot developer.

loc_deleted_per_active_dev.purpose: Normalized daily deleted LoC per active Copilot developer.

acceptance_rate.purpose: Daily acceptance ratio for Copilot generation activity.

cfg_total_dev_loc_added_day.purpose: Configured daily total developer added LoC for comparison/testing mode.
cfg_total_dev_loc_added_day.notes: Placeholder until real daily total developer LoC is sourced.

cfg_time_saved_pct_day.purpose: Configured daily time-saved percentage used for test-mode visibility.
cfg_time_saved_pct_day.notes: Placeholder until real estimation methods are implemented day by day.

cfg_baseline_hours_per_dev_per_week.purpose: Baseline weekly hours used to convert time-saved percent into weekly hours per active developer.
cfg_baseline_hours_per_dev_per_week.notes: For testing, likely represents coding hours per developer per week.

cfg_workdays_per_week.purpose: Converts weekly per-dev hours into daily aggregate impact.

cfg_time_saved_input_mode.purpose: Documents the current estimation mode driving the page.
cfg_time_saved_input_mode.notes: Useful while transitioning from test mode to implemented methods.

cfg_labor_cost_per_hour.purpose: Fully loaded hourly labor cost used to convert time saved into a dollar equivalent.
cfg_labor_cost_per_hour.notes: Applied once per period, not per day. Example: 75.00 for $75/hr fully loaded.

time_saved_hours_per_active_dev_per_week.source: derived from configured daily test inputs
time_saved_hours_per_active_dev_per_week.purpose: Primary normalized outcome metric shown in row 1 col 1.
time_saved_hours_per_active_dev_per_week.notes: Displayed daily, but unit is hours saved per active dev per week.

time_saved_hours_per_active_dev_per_day.source: derived from configured daily test inputs
time_saved_hours_per_active_dev_per_day.purpose: Daily per-active-dev time-saved value used in aggregate calculations.
time_saved_hours_per_active_dev_per_day.notes: Intermediate field for total daily impact.

time_saved_hours_total_day.source: derived from configured daily test inputs and active users
time_saved_hours_total_day.purpose: Daily aggregate hours saved for the selected enterprise scope.
time_saved_hours_total_day.notes: Summed across days to get the 28-day total aggregate impact.

copilot_loc_share_of_total_dev_loc_day.source: derived from enterprise telemetry and configured daily total LoC
copilot_loc_share_of_total_dev_loc_day.purpose: Daily share of total developer added LoC attributed to Copilot-related flows.
copilot_loc_share_of_total_dev_loc_day.notes: Testing/visibility field until real daily total developer LoC is available.

labor_cost_equivalent_28d.source: derived from time_saved_hours_total_day aggregate and configured labor cost
labor_cost_equivalent_28d.purpose: Dollar equivalent of total hours saved across the 28-day window at the configured labor cost rate.
labor_cost_equivalent_28d.notes: Window-level aggregate, not a daily field. Null when cfg_labor_cost_per_hour is not configured.

selected_time_method.purpose: Documents which time-estimation method currently drives the primary row-1 chart.

calculation_version.purpose: Version tag for derived field logic.

notes.purpose: Freeform notes for special handling, caveats, or anomalies.
